arts.ttl: Anthony Elanga shows true Man United colours straight after scoring for Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the academy graduate opened the scoring in the Premier League clash at the City Ground

arts.ttl: Fans all say the same thing after Anthony Elanga wondergoal puts Nottingham Forest ahead against Man United
arts.sum: Football fans have heaped praise on Nottingham Forest star Anthony Elanga after he opened the scoring with a stunning goal against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Why isn't Arsenal vs Fulham on TV? Gunners fans fume at 'ridiculous' decision as Man Utd preferred
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League clash with Fulham wasn't chosen by TNT Sports, leaving Gunners supporters furious as Manchester United against Nottingham Forest was preferred

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim identifies first two Man Utd stars he wants to sell to fund new striker
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is plotting a summer overhaul of his struggling Manchester United squad but the club will need to sell before they can buy amid their difficult financial position

arts.ttl: Why Rasmus Hojlund is on the bench for Man United vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has shuffled his attack for the Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United travel to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Follow live with ESPN as Man United. travel to Premier League high-flyers Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Man Utd hold key advantage in five-way battle for Liam Delap and begin transfer talks
arts.sum: Liam Delap is said to have a release clause in his contract if Ipswich Town are relegated from the Premier League and Manchester United are among five clubs targeting the striker

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest v Manchester United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scores | Read Football Daily | And email Scott Nuno Espírito Santo speaks to TNT Sports. “It's a very important match and a tough one … everybody is OK … the boys are ready to go … [our squad] is deep … we have Danilo … we have players on the bench who can help … we are enjoying the journey, the ride … we are playing with confidence … belief … the City Ground is so special … the home form we are achieving is due to [the fans] … it is difficult for a manager to come in the middle of the season … you need time … so I think Ruben [Amorim] is in that process … hope we can repeat [last season’s win in this fixture] again.” A pre-match palate-whetter, courtesy of friend of the site Steve Pye. “I wondered if you might be interested in a blog of mine looking back at Nottingham Forest dramatically beating Man Utd in December 1984?” Sure thing! “For the second time in two weeks, Ron Atkinson’s team threw away a two-goal lead on the road, with a couple of their players coming to blows in the dressing room after the match.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'He will do everything' - Agent sends message to Ruben Amorim about Manchester United star
arts.sum: Man United defender Diogo Dalot is determined to succeed at Old Trafford for head coach Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Amorim responds to Bruno Fernandes’ Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has this week spoken out on the speculation linking star midfielder Bruno Fernandes with a move to Spain. The name of Portuguese international Fernandes…
